meta.title: Air Force Jobs - Becoming an Astronaut
meta.description:
For those who dream of becoming an astronaut, serving time in the Air Force flying will make them a very strong candidate for selection. Airmen have been favoured when positions become available because of their education, fitness and flight hours.
NASA only invites applications as it needs them and training to become an astronaut even after serving in the Air Force can take upwards of 2 years. The Air Force have been present on almost every U.S. space mission and this long legacy looks set to continue.

Are you or a loved one about to become the future of the Air Force?

Stay connected at every step of the Air Force journey as well as getting training advice every week with the Sandboxx app: https://link.sandboxx.us/youtube
